$comment: GitHub Copilot CLI — a DISTINCT product from the VS Code / agent-mode surface (which uses PascalCase events; do not mix the two vocabularies). Place this file as .github/hooks/coalhearth.json (repo) or ~/.copilot/hooks/coalhearth.json (user). camelCase events per the CLI's own docs (verified 2026-07-15); each entry ships both a bash and a powershell command string for Windows parity. Copilot has a real per-session sessionStart, so the trailing 'FileCopy' argument runs the adapters marker-free in their plain Claude-Code stdout shape — sessionStart's exact context-inject field is UNVERIFIED, so that plain shape is a best-guess; flag if the recovery block never appears. postToolUse journals every tool call (field casing unverified — the reader probes both snake_case and camelCase). Adjust C:/path/to/CoalHearth in every command. Tier: wired — built + hermetically tested vs the primary docs; NO live Copilot CLI session has run this wiring yet.
